data.change_summary: Centralized agent `RecordProducer` construction from `InvocationEnvelope.metadata` and updated prompt-review, completion, final-review, and single-stage workflow persistence paths to use it, so persisted record producer metadata now comes from `backend_used`/`model_used` instead of rebuilding from resolved targets at each call site. Added a focused helper regression test and strengthened the producer serialization conformance assertion; no `src/adapters/fs.rs` struct change was needed because `ArtifactRecord` already serializes the populated `producer` fields.
outstanding_risks: `AgentExecutionService` currently normalizes `backend_used`/`model_used` to the resolved target before orchestration reads the envelope, so there is not yet an end-to-end test that demonstrates divergent adapter-reported metadata flowing into persisted artifacts.

steps.description: Add a shared workflow helper that builds an agent `RecordProducer` from invocation metadata.
Route prompt-review, completion, final-review, and generic stage persistence through the metadata-backed producer helper.
Add regression coverage for the helper, strengthen producer serialization assertions, and run targeted Rust tests in the Nix dev shell.

validation_evidence: `rg -n "RecordProducer::Agent \{" src/contexts/workflow_composition src -g'*.rs'` now shows production construction centralized in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/mod.rs`, with the remaining direct instantiation in the conformance test assertion only.
